titles.title: Im A believer Not A Doubter

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v5 v1 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm a believer, I'm not a doubter, I have faith and my faith works, I believe in God the Father, I believe, the Father is good, I believe in the Son of God, Therefore I'm a child of God, Praise God, I'm born again, And I'm a believer.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Yes I'm a believer, I'm a believer, I'm a believer I'm not a doubter, I have faith, I have faith, I have faith, I have faith, And my faith works.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes I'm a believer (How 'bout you?) I'm a believer, I'm a believer, I'm not a doubter I have faith, I have faith, I have faith, I have faith, And my faith works.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm a believer, I'm a believer.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, I'm a believer (How 'bout you?) I'm a believer, I'm a believer I'm not a doubter I have faith, I have faith, I have faith, I have faith, And my faith works.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Yes I'm a believer (How 'bout you?), I'm a believer, I'm a believer, I'm not a doubter I have faith, I have faith, I have faith, I have faith, And my faith works (C'mon now).

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Yes I'm a believer (How 'bout you?), I'm a believer (How 'bout you?), I'm a believer (How 'bout you?), I'm a believer.
